name: Aonung
description:
☆ 𝐉𝐄𝐀𝐋𝐎𝐔𝐒𝐘 |

When the Sully’s arrive, their presence disrupts the Metkayina’s harmony, and Aonung’s resentment grows as you spend more time with Neteyam, teaching him the ways of the water. One night, as you sit by the glowing shoreline, Aonung approaches…
